attractions.name: Bali Safari & Marine Park
attractions.description: Immersive park home to over 100 species, including Komodo dragons, orangutans, and Bengal tigers. Enjoy tram safaris, animal encounters, and cultural performances
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Desmond.pdf

attractions.name: Campuhan Ridge Walk
attractions.description: Scenic 2-km walk along a grassy ridge offers panoramic views of the Ubud hills
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Desmond.pdf

attractions.name: Outback Ubud Adventure
attractions.description: ATV adventure through Ubud's picturesque landscapes
attractions.entry_fee: 345,000 IDR for single and 575,000 IDR for tandem
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Desmond.pdf

attractions.name: Ubud Palace (Puri Saren Agung)
attractions.description: The palace showcases classic Balinese architecture — carved wooden doors, golden pavilions, and atmospheric courtyards
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Pratheek_All Inclusive Guide_Bali.pdf

attractions.name: Saraswati Temple
attractions.description: Famed for its lotus-covered ponds, this temple feels serene and poetic
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Pratheek_All Inclusive Guide_Bali.pdf

attractions.name: Pura Taman Kemuda Saraswati (Water Palace)
attractions.description: Lotus ponds, temple carvings, and still reflective waters make this one of Ubud's most photogenic corners
source_files: Bali Indonesia/All Inclusive Guide- Bali.docx

attractions.name: Alas Harum & Super Extreme Swing
attractions.description: Scenic complex overlooking dramatic valley with giant bamboo nests, jungle swings, coffee plantations, and layered infinity-style terraces
source_files: Bali Indonesia/All Inclusive Guide- Bali.docx

attractions.name: Ubud River Rafting
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

attractions.name: Alas Harum
attractions.description: Alas Harum in Bali offers thrilling ziplining and various Bali swing experiences that soar high above lush rice terraces and jungle landscapes, providing breathtaking views and excellent photo opportunities
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf
